MC_PLAN_ID 
LABEL: 
Managed Care Plan Identification Number 
DESCRIPTION: Contains the ID number the state issued to the managed care entity.

LONG NAME: MC_PLAN_ID 
TYPE: 
CHAR

12 
FILE(S): 
All Annual Managed Care Plan files 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Annual Managed Care Plan TAF 
VALUES:
